# Murikah

> Assurance. Systems. Intelligence. Pronounced moo-REE-kah, rhymes with Eureka.

Murikah is an AI-native assurance and governance company. It helps regulated mid-market organisations run, prove and continuously improve their internal audit and their AI and system governance, at a fraction of the cost and rigidity of the Big 4 and enterprise governance, risk and compliance (GRC) software. The company combines senior, standards-based assurance judgement with a working software platform in one relationship, priced for the mid-market rather than the global enterprise. Its work follows the IIA Global Internal Audit Standards and the ISO/IEC 27001 and ISO/IEC 42001 standards. Some pages on the site still carry clearly-marked placeholder tokens pending final confirmation.

## The six lines of work

- Murikah Assurance: co-sourced and outsourced internal audit, systems and IT audits, data protection reviews, and ISO 42001 and AI-governance readiness. https://www.murikah.com/assurance
- Murikah Audit OS: the subscription platform for work papers, approvals, findings and remediation, follow-ups, board reporting and an AI assistant, priced from about KES 15,000 a month. https://www.murikah.com/audit-os
- Murikah Labs: automation builds, CRM and CMS, workflow engineering and custom automations, from a team that audits a process before automating it. https://www.murikah.com/labs
- Murikah Advisory: AI strategy and governance roadmaps, research and analytics, and executive decks and board papers. https://www.murikah.com/advisory
- Murikah Academy: training and certification, including CISA preparation, ISO 42001 awareness and lead-auditor readiness, and practical masterclasses. https://www.murikah.com/academy
- Murikah Intelligence: anonymised cross-client benchmarking and an annual flagship report, both forthcoming as the client base grows. https://www.murikah.com/intelligence

## Who it is for

Heads of internal audit, audit committee and board chairs, CFOs, CEOs, and heads of risk and compliance at regulated mid-market organisations. The first focus is SACCOs (regulated by SASRA), banks, microfinance institutions and fintechs (supervised by the Central Bank of Kenya), and donor-funded NGOs, with family-owned businesses that have active boards close behind.

## Standards the work follows

Murikah works to the IIA Global Internal Audit Standards for its internal audit work, and to the ISO/IEC 27001 standard for information security and the ISO/IEC 42001 standard for AI management systems, which it audits against and helps clients prepare for. These are the standards the company works to and helps clients with, not certifications the company holds.
